usage:
  style check [flags]

run STYLE.md checks

flags:
  -format string
      	format: text|json (default "text")
    -profile string
      	profile: required|all (default "required")
    -repo-root string
      	repository root (auto-detected when omitted)
    -scope string
      	scope: app|tools|all (default "all")
    -strict-recommendations
      	fail on recommendation findings
    -verbose
      	print failing output
